sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88241" key="proparaskeuaste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προπαρασκευ-αστέον</orth>, <sense id="n88241.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must prepare before,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.124a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
